ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the ward */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the ward */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the ward */,
  "average_persons_per_area" REAL /* Average number of persons per area */,
  "number_of_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the ward */,
  "population_in_households" INTEGER /* Number of people living in households */,
  "number_of_dwellings" INTEGER /* Number of dwellings in the ward */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the ward */,
  "persons_per_room" REAL /* Average number of persons per room */,
  "percentage_overcrowded" REAL /* Percentage of households that are overcrowded */,
  "ward_area" REAL /* Total area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the ward */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the ward was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ward's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the household is located */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the household */,
  "overcrowded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the household is overcrowded (true if overcrowded, false otherwise) */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Average income of the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., single, joint, family) */,
  "dwelling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dwelling where the household resides */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_dwelling_id FOREIGN KEY ("dwelling_id") REFERENCES dwellings ("dwelling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dwellings" (
  "dwelling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dwelling */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the dwelling is located */,
  "dwelling_type" TEXT /* Type of dwelling (e.g., house, apartment, flat) */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the dwelling */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Occupancy status of the dwelling (e.g., occupied, vacant) */,
  "dwelling_age" INTEGER /* Age of the dwelling in years */,
  "dwelling_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the dwelling (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the dwelling (e.g., owned, rented, leased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dwelling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dwellings_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)
